proposed_hypotheses.text: For each 10-unit increase in `feature_041`, mean `pfs_months` is higher in this cohort.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_041
analyses.result_summary: Each 10-unit increase in feature_041 was associated with 1.699 months difference in pfs_months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS including all available feature columns
analyses.result_summary: After adjustment for the other feature columns, the feature_041 coefficient remained 1.684 months per 10 units (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_025` equal to `never` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_025` equal to `current`.
Patients with `feature_025` equal to `former` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_025` equal to `current`.

analyses.code: Welch mean comparison: feature_025 never vs current
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.675 for feature_025=never versus 2.987 for feature_025=current, a difference of 0.687 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch mean comparison: feature_025 former vs current
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.607 for feature_025=former versus 2.987 for feature_025=current, a difference of 0.620 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with feature_025 dummies and all other feature columns
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficients versus feature_025=current were 0.545 months for never (p<1e-300) and 0.552 months for former (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015` equal to `squamous` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015` equal to `adenocarcinoma`.

analyses.code: Welch mean comparison: feature_015 squamous vs adenocarcinoma
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.813 for feature_015=squamous versus 3.670 for feature_015=adenocarcinoma, a difference of -0.857 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with feature_015 dummy and all other feature columns
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for feature_015=squamous versus adenocarcinoma was -0.723 months (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_036` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036` equal to 0.
Patients with `feature_036` equal to 2 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Welch mean comparison: feature_036=1 vs feature_036=0
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.185 for feature_036=1 versus 4.327 for feature_036=0, a difference of -1.141 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch mean comparison: feature_036=2 vs feature_036=0
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 2.152 for feature_036=2 versus 4.327 for feature_036=0, a difference of -2.175 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS with feature_036 dummies and all other feature columns
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficients versus feature_036=0 were -1.147 months for level 1 (p<1e-300) and -2.178 months for level 2 (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_050` values are associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_050
analyses.result_summary: A one-SD increase in feature_050 was associated with 0.014 months difference in pfs_months (p=0.157).

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS including all feature columns
analyses.result_summary: After adjustment, the feature_050 coefficient was 0.001 months per SD (p=0.677).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `feature_010` equal to 1 and `pfs_months` is more positive when `feature_009` is also equal to 1, compared with additivity of their separate effects.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ feature_010 + feature_009 + feature_010:feature_009 plus core covariates
analyses.result_summary: The feature_010:feature_009 interaction coefficient was 2.493 months beyond additivity (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The slope relating `feature_041` to `pfs_months` is more negative among patients with `feature_001` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_001` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS interaction: centered feature_041 * feature_001 plus core covariates
analyses.result_summary: The interaction was -0.139 months per SD of feature_041 among feature_001=1 relative to feature_001=0 (p<1e-300).

analyses.result_summary: The interaction was -0.143 months per SD of feature_041 among feature_042=1 relative to feature_042=0 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: OLS interaction: centered feature_041 * feature_010 plus core covariates
analyses.result_summary: The interaction was 0.082 months per SD of feature_041 among feature_010=1 relative to feature_010=0 (p=5.81e-8).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The slope relating `feature_041` to `pfs_months` is more negative among patients with `feature_028` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_028` equal to 0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A multivariable model using all available feature columns explains a non-trivial share of variation in `pfs_months`, with several independent adjusted associations remaining significant.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ all feature columns with dummies for non-binary categorical features
analyses.result_summary: The full feature model had R-squared 0.894. The strongest adjusted terms by absolute z statistic were feature_041=0.168mo (p<1e-300); feature_036=2=-2.178mo (p<1e-300); feature_001=-1.417mo (p<1e-300); feature_036=1=-1.147mo (p<1e-300); feature_042=-0.912mo (p<1e-300); feature_015=squamous=-0.723mo (p<1e-300); feature_010=0.892mo (p<1e-300); feature_004=-0.073mo (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_065` equal to 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_065` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Welch mean comparison and adjusted OLS for feature_065
analyses.result_summary: The unadjusted difference for feature_065=1 versus 0 was -6.54e-4 months (p=0.978); the adjusted coefficient was -0.005 months (p=0.491). This did not support a meaningful association.
